benefits.description: Started at 197 lbs, got down to 133 lbs on Retatrutide. Currently on maintenance with both Reta and Cagri, fluctuating between 133-136 lbs.

protocol_notes: Female, 5'9" tall. Tried all GLPs (Tirzepatide, Semaglutide, Retatrutide). Reports Retatrutide was the best. Also tried Contrave previously and lost about 60 lbs on that. Currently on maintenance doses of Retatrutide and Tirzepatide, refusing to count calories. Weight fluctuates naturally between 133-136 lbs, which is acceptable.
